overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, starting at an intersection with neon billboards, proceeding through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an overpass with digital advertisements, and emerging onto an open waterfront promenade. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-quality game engine rendering with distinctive neon lighting and futuristic urban architecture.

entering covered pedestrian walkway beneath the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection at night, dominated by a large neon billboard reading 'YOU CAN TRUST' above a building entrance. An orange six-wheeled SUV drives past the camera, which then proceeds forward across the crosswalk toward a covered walkway entrance marked by cyan neon lighting. The environment features wet reflective pavement and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with commercial stalls and overhead digital displays

events.description: passing under bright yellow linear neon ceiling lights creating warm illumination
overhead digital billboards change advertisements displaying colorful product images

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor beneath the overpass, passing other pedestrians

commercial food vendor with illuminated menu displays and service counter

multi-lane road with moving traffic visible through the walkway openings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive overpass, illuminated by artificial yellow neon strips and digital billboards overhead. The corridor features commercial stalls on the left and a view of traffic on the right. Decorative pillars with spherical lights line the path as the camera follows other pedestrians through this sheltered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into open waterfront area with visible night sky
ambient lighting shifts from warm artificial yellow to cooler natural night tones

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens up to reveal the waterfront and distant cityscape

entered.detail: open view of water with distant illuminated buildings and mountains on the horizon
tall concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
massive concrete overpass pillars and beams framing the walkway exit
green industrial dumpsters and trash containers against the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from the enclosed walkway to an open waterfront promenade. The camera emerges from beneath the overpass into a wider space with a visible night sky and distant city lights across the water. The left side features a concrete wall covered in graffiti and industrial trash bins, while the right side opens to a view of the waterfront road and distant skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crowded neon intersection through a sheltered urban corridor and out onto an open waterfront promenade. It begins at a futuristic city crossing dominated by a large neon billboard, moving across wet reflective pavement as an orange six-wheeled SUV drives past. As the camera proceeds forward, the scene shifts from the open street into a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive overpass, where the lighting transitions to artificial yellow neon strips and digital billboards. The camera then follows a path lined with commercial stalls and decorative pillars before emerging from the enclosure into a wider space. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal a night sky and a distant city skyline across the water, passing a graffiti-covered concrete wall as the view expands toward the waterfront road.
